description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped storage box constructed from a dark, wood-like material. The box features recessed rectangular handles on its shorter sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with visible fasteners at the corners, suggesting sturdy assembly. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding various items such as tools, supplies, or personal belongings. There are no visible lids, locks, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. Its robust build and simple design make it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban storage settings.
description: A dark, open-topped rectangular storage box with recessed side handles and a matte, slightly textured finish. Sturdy and utilitarian, it is well-suited for urban storage or garage use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top and one of the long, plain sides with visible corner fasteners and a recessed handle on the inner side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the short end with a rectangular recessed handle cutout and the open interior.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the plain long side with corner fasteners and the opposite recessed handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other short end with a matching recessed handle cutout and open interior.
attribute_handle_design: recessed rectangular handles on both short sides
